title: Creating campaign type board
excerpt: While creating an board through api, it is by default creating a item type board but i want to create a Campaign type board, is there any way if yes then tell or how to retrieve template_id of a campaign type board

posts.author: Ashutosh (Ashutosh Tiwari)
posts.cookedHtml:
While creating an board through api, it is by default creating a item type board but i want to create a Campaign type board, is there any way if yes then tell or how to retrieve template_id of a campaign type board

image2220×920 162 KB

posts.author: Billchenau (Bill)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Ashutosh

Bill here from monday.com

If you were referring to the board’s item terminology (“New Campaign” vs “New Item”), then this can be set within the platform only and can’t be done via the API.

image840×826 54.6 KB

I hope this helps.

Cheers,
Bill
